official_functions.role: Construct the official empty-property GameProfile fixture
Construct the official Login clientbound login_finished packet fixture
Write the official Login clientbound login_finished body through ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE
Write the full Login clientbound framed login_finished packet
Dispatch and decode the full Login clientbound framed login_finished packet
Name the packet id assigned in Login clientbound state
Read decoded Login finished fields and confirm the clientbound listener surface

invariants: The official Login clientbound protocol codec writes the packet table id before the login_finished body.
The official Login clientbound protocol codec dispatches the framed packet id to ClientboundLoginFinishedPacket.
The official ClientboundLoginFinishedPacket body is ByteBufCodecs.GAME_PROFILE: UUID, PLAYER_NAME stringUtf8(16), and GAME_PROFILE_PROPERTIES.
The decoded official ClientboundLoginFinishedPacket preserves GameProfile id, name, empty property count, and terminal flag from the fixture.

The framed bytes, packet table id, body bytes, decoded packet class, decoded packet type, decoded fields, Login clientbound packet table, and remaining decode byte count are generated by the official jar-backed answer artifact.

This contract does not prove authentication success, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, profile property semantics, skin/session trust, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
test_topology_note: rust_test_target names the current case adapter only; the manifest owns the runnable test topology.
stop_boundary: Do not use this framed dispatch/decode contract to infer authentication success, Login-to-Configuration state transition handling, profile property semantics, skin/session trust, Configuration entry, Play readiness, or client-load completion.
